name: xdc-x402-fx-agent
description: AI agent that pays for FX rate APIs via x402 (HTTP 402) with USDC on XDC Network

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,agent,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w agent" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:prod && pm2 restart ecosystem.config.cjs || pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
